title: Checkout AI Assistant — Launch Alpha Brief
author: alice.chen
content:
# Checkout AI Assistant — Launch Alpha Brief

Subject to legal review before publishing.

## Overview
NovaLoop is launching the Checkout AI Assistant as part of Launch Alpha on Monday, April 28 at 9:00 AM PT. This product enables natural-language checkout assistance for e-commerce storefronts integrated via the NovaLoop SDK.

## Launch Goals
- Activate first 50 beta storefronts on the AI-assisted checkout flow
- Achieve <2s average response time on checkout intent detection
- Zero P0 incidents in the first 24 hours post-launch

## Dependencies
- Engineering: Checkout API v2 integration complete and tested
- Design: Launch page assets live and QA-approved
- GTM: Launch email scheduled and pricing approved by legal
- QA: Full smoke test signed off on staging

## Risks
- API v2 migration (see NOVA-142) is currently blocking launch page integration
- Legal pricing review on GTM email not yet complete

## Success Metrics
- 50 storefronts onboarded within 72 hours
- NPS > 40 from beta customers in week 1

## Owner
Alice Chen, Product Manager — alice.chen@novaloop.io
